proof_rounds.subject: commit 179f7c2 key-v3 proof and execution
fatal_findings: semantic key omitted transition-relevant runtime state and its sufficiency was self-attested
transducer and brute replay shared rebindable scientific helpers
collision validator did not independently recompute feasible actions
path multiplicity, discarded-witness identity and request-lag equivalence were not certified
completed/lost orders and older risks lacked serialization or a sufficient-statistic proof

proof_rounds.subject: dirty-worktree full-history/inductive remediation
counterexamples: post-freeze MFSCSimulation.__init__.__defaults__ shifts 1 to 3 changed canonical primary while certificate and W4 exhaustive still passed
post-freeze np.mean replacement changed canonical primary while certificate and W4 exhaustive still passed
custom SourceLoader compiled a condition-deleting semantic payload while disk source and inspect.getsource remained original; import freeze self-blessed it
positive_checks_only: post-import run_prefix and semantic-payload rebinding rejected
impossible action sets, multiplicity, request-lag and witness tampering rejected
completed/lost-order and old-risk mutations changed the key
W6 represented all 43 calendars with 10 witnesses and 77 lag checks
implementation W8 represented all 171 calendars with 45 witnesses and 274 lag checks
proof_rounds.release_blocker: Bind method defaults/closures, statically used module attributes and independently compiled source-to-loaded code before a fresh audit.

proof_rounds.subject: complete semantic-state and loaded-runtime remediation after round 2
closed_counterexamples: staticmethod descriptor and inherited SimPy method mutation
callable defaults, closures and statically reachable module-attribute mutation
request lag, multiplicity and collision-root omission
alias, callback, scheduled-process, resource, inventory, order and complete terminal-state omission
runtime widening of the complete-witness exclusion schema
positive_checks_only: two fresh W2 processes produced the same complete scientific witness after the strengthened state proof
all-calendar output count/digest, terminal count, collision examples, endpoint replay and proof audit were added to the execution witness
recursively reachable helper source/code identities were exposed separately after a test caught an inventory omission
proof_rounds.claim_limit: These are proof-logic tests on dirty development bytes. They do not authorize a reduced scientific run until the launch, isolation, receipt and archival chain passes independently.

custody_rounds.counterexample: A coherent returned-bundle replacement could replace commands or all 60 seed/tape/certificate identities and every internal checksum because the returned tree authenticated itself.
An external base anchor still allowed unchanged-input all-60 result substitution, runtime-context substitution, post-hoc anchor minting and omission of staged archive hashes.
A completed bundle could be rewound and a new self-consistent base/stage/launch chain minted; retrieve derived the expected digest from mutable local state.

controls: caller-retained out-of-band launch receipt path and SHA-256 are mandatory
retrieval never derives the expected launch digest from mutable sidecars
deterministic tape hashes, source/control archives, remote path/runtime and exact argv are externally bound
post-hoc/rewrite attacks fail against the originally retained digest
stage and launch receipt v2 require 256-bit nonces
custody_rounds.claim_limit: Trusted-local custody model only; no proof against a malicious local actor controlling the custody store without signing/TSA. Retrieved artifacts remain evidence=false/AUDIT_PENDING until independent proof and replay.

custody_rounds.counterexample: The reduced-suite authorization omitted the frozen split, the threat-tape digest did not distinguish split, and an arbitrary split could pass a self-consistent reduced certificate.
custody_rounds.remediation: W12 and W16 suites now bind their exact burned split in authorization creation, canonical argv reconstruction, payload validation, tape identity and receipt checks.

custody_rounds.counterexample: The exact two-process path launched a direct inherited-environment child with -I -B, while the hardened harness launched -I -B -S through a sanitized bootstrap and emitted a different receipt schema. No execution could satisfy both chains end to end.
custody_rounds.remediation_required: One canonical isolated-bootstrap argv and one authorization/receipt chain must bind the bootstrap, runtime attestation, sanitized child environment and exact scientific output.

custody_rounds.counterexample: An independent auditor created two legitimate prelaunch authorizations, copied one structurally valid W2 payload while changing only execution identity, fabricated distinct PIDs/return codes and post-run receipts, retained every resulting SHA-256, and obtained passed=true without launching either child.
custody_rounds.scientific_meaning: Authorization/output/receipt hashes provide self-consistency and tamper evidence; they do not prove process spawn, exit or independent recomputation.
custody_rounds.remediation_required: Distinct sanitized parent launchers must hold distinct ephemeral Ed25519 private keys outside child files/environment/descriptors, expose caller-retained public-key fingerprints before launch, open fresh custody paths fail-closed, spawn fixed canonical children, wait for exit, hash runtime/output/log bytes and sign post-exit receipts. Later authorization must reopen every archived artifact and rerun signature plus scientific verification rather than trust a stored passed flag.
custody_rounds.residual_claim_limit: Even signed launch/exit attestation is not a TEE or generic proof of computation. The accepted threat model must state that pinned runner/launcher bytes execute honestly and that hostile root or same-UID memory inspection/cross-tree copying is outside scope unless separately sandboxed.

complete_suite_results: signed execution/relocation harness: 72 passed in 184.90 seconds
independent_attack_results: two independently signed and acknowledged W2 children were actually launched
each copied archive passed single-run retrieval verification
the relocated pair required distinct keys, manifests, authorizations, receipts and outputs with matching portable scope and exact witness
the pair rejected both W2 probes solely because they were deliberately non-scientific smoke executions
no-ACK, key substitution, signed-field mutation, receipt swap, log/output/runtime tamper, symlink, traversal, manifest substitution, same-root reuse and wrong-role attacks failed closed
custody_rounds.schema_freeze_rule: The audited dirty-byte implementation must be mechanically renamed to semantic key v4 and exact result v5, then carry a separately versioned bound authorization after portable archive review, rerun in full, and be committed immutably before any scientific reduced-horizon launch. Historical key-v2/key-v3 results remain invalid.
custody_rounds.threat_model: Honest pinned parent launcher, exact runner and control plane. Hostile trusted root/caller, same-UID memory inspection, malicious pinned-runner cross-tree copying, TEE attestation and generic proof-of-computation are outside scope and must not be claimed.

custody_rounds.counterexample: A copied signed W2 archive remained accepted when either its canonical result path or signed transfer-manifest path was replaced by an in-root symlink to byte-identical content. The confinement helper resolved paths before callers inspected is_symlink, erasing the lexical alias.
custody_rounds.scientific_effect: Portable W24 authorization remained blocked even though the initial portable-pair unit suite passed.
custody_rounds.remediation_required: Before resolution, lstat every existing descendant component below the explicit trusted archive root; route checksum creation, transfer-manifest creation, single-transfer and pair verification, tracked authorization artifacts, classic pair reverification and frontier repository artifacts through that one checker. Add byte-identical result-leaf, manifest-leaf and intermediate-directory symlink regressions.

complete_suite_results: exact proof runner: 49 passed, 1 skipped in 213.63 seconds
signed harness plus full-frontier: 92 passed in 308.67 seconds
focused lexical attack suite: 9 passed in 23.98 seconds
independent_attack_results: 11 focused signed-transfer, portable-pair, legacy, tamper, reuse and witness/scope tests passed in 20.80 seconds
clean copied transfer, portable pair fresh reverification, cached-PASS rejection and both transfer-chain dispatch passed
custody_rounds.residual_claim_limit: Lexical lstat/check/read is not atomic against a hostile concurrent filesystem writer. Acceptance assumes the pinned parent/control plane and archive filesystem are honest during verification. This is not TEE attestation or generic proof of computation; hostile root, trusted-caller compromise and same-UID memory attacks remain outside scope.

next_release_rule: Commit the accepted key-v4/result-v5/authorization-v9/portable-pair-v3 bytes immutably. Then run and archive two separately keyed/parented W12 and W16 burned-tape pairs with caller-retained prelaunch fingerprints, transfer-manifest digests and fresh portable archive reverification. No W24 work is authorized before those gates and no signed receipt may be described as TEE-backed proof of computation.
